title: rubus candicans subsp. thyrsanthus
intro: Rubus candicans subsp. thyrsanthus, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. It is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its potential medicinal and health benefits.
